session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of the changes:
**PR #8657**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8657
### Changes Made
**Core fix — `roadmap.py`**: `parse_roadmap()` now returns `([], [])` when no `objective-roadmap` metadata block exists (valid roadmap-free objective), and only returns the legacy format error when a block exists but fails to parse.
**`check_cmd.py`**: `validate_objective()` uses `has_metadata_block()` to detect whether a roadmap block exists. If absent, it passes with "Roadmap: none (objective has no roadmap)" and skips all roadmap-dependent checks (3-7). `_output_human()` handles empty summary without the "(0/0 done)" suffix.
**`view_cmd.py`**: Uses `extract_raw_metadata_blocks()` to check for block presence before calling `parse_v2_roadmap()`. No block = empty phases (existing "No roadmap data found" display path). Block exists but unparseable = legacy error (unchanged).
**Tests updated**: - `test_roadmap.py`: `test_parse_roadmap_no_metadata_block` now asserts `errors == []` - `test_check_cmd.py`: Renamed `test_malformed_roadmap_fails` → `test_roadmap_free_objective_passes` (exit_code 0, PASS), added `test_roadmap_free_objective_json_output` - `test_view_cmd.py`: `test_view_objective_empty_roadmap` now expects exit_code 0 + "No roadmap data found"; `test_view_objective_legacy_format_rejected` → `test_view_objective_table_only_shows_as_roadmap_free` (exit_code 0)
**`objective-create.md`**: Updated success reporting to document the no-roadmap case.
All 47 objective tests pass. CI lint and type checks clean.
